betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The power of Actualization.
The ability to reach out, and to grasp. To take. Endlessly. Without limits.
The capacity to create, truly, from nothing.
This magic, it is vastly different from anything I have witnessed.
It reminds of Fluix magic, it possesses a similar trace to the Arbiter's powers. Space as a medium of power. Order and rules as paramount for success. Imagination as the driver of the recursive field.
It also reminds me of Alchemy. It possesses many of the same rules. Some sort of attunement, some sort of memory. Equivalence between matter and energy.
Is this why the Shyre Empire and the Twilight Horde sought this power? 
Was it a way to circumvent their loss of Alchemy? To obtain the power of creation despite their apparent forsaking?
A way to compensate for what they could not possess? The only thing they did not have in their grasp?
An act of pride, to prove that limitations do not apply to those who hold on to power? 
Yes, that may be the answer.
A point to be proven, no matter how high the cost, no matter the number of lives lost. A petty challenge.
I am yet again abhorred by the implications of power, of its venomous appeal.
Yes, they way I am now, I cannot be a Fractallite...
